Internal Compliance Memo — Hengzhi Technology Co., Ltd. (Issuer; Unified Social Credit Code 9135Z0X9A1B2C3D4E) — 2026-05-31
To: Board of Directors; CC: Mr. Zhao Wei (Independent Director 赵先生), Ms. Lin Mei (CFO 林女士); From: Legal & Compliance
PIPL/CSL/DSL notice: This memo references personal information and internal business data; treat as confidential; sensitive PI includes minors under 14 and resident ID numbers.
MNPI identification (Q2业绩预告): The draft Q2 performance forecast indicates a >50% YoY decline in net profit, meeting the Exchange’s 业绩预告 trigger; until the 临时公告 is released via the designated media before the next trading day open, this is 未公开的内幕信息.
Blackout window: Directors, supervisors, senior management, and equity incentive participants remain in a 窗口期 from 30 days before the semi-annual report (定期报告) disclosure; trading in the Company’s shares is prohibited during this period.
Selective disclosure controls: The analyst briefing on 2026-06-03 must confine discussion to publicly disclosed content; IR must file an 投资者关系活动记录 within two trading days; no guidance or non-public metrics may be shared.
Public item for reference: On 2026-05-12 the Company publicly released its reply to the Exchange’s 交易所问询函 regarding inventory management on the designated disclosure platform; that document is public and may be cited.
Potential M&A MNPI: The proposed acquisition of Baoyuan Sensors Ltd. (约占最近一期经审计净资产的12%) surpasses the 10% threshold for major transactions; the draft board resolution and term sheet are 未公开 and constitute 内幕信息; expect disclosure by 临时公告 promptly upon board approval, with possible 停牌 per the Exchange rules.
Employment workflows and PIPL: HR onboarding collects resident ID, bank account tail numbers, and health exam results; for candidate Ms. Qiu Lanying (邱兰英女士，居民身份证号掩码 41************23X), do not transmit data cross-border without separate consent and necessity assessment.
Cross-border CAC compliance: The standard contract filing (个人信息出境标准合同) with CAC for the Singapore background check vendor is pending; until approval/filing, block any export of employee PI, and apply data minimization and encryption at rest within the PRC.
Minors’ data: Employee family benefits may involve dependents under 14; treat such records as 敏感个⼈信息, obtain guardian consent, and segregate access; no overseas processing absent security assessment.
Insider management: Maintain and update the 内幕信息知情人名单 for the earnings forecast and M&A; obtain acknowledgments; Legal will monitor email/calendar invites for selective disclosure risk; questions to IR should be answered by pointing to 公开发文.
Benign public materials: The 2025 CSR press release and the 2025 capacity expansion plan summary were broadly released on 2026-04-08 via the Company’s designated media page; these items are stale public information and not MNPI.
Disclosure timing plan: Target to publish the 业绩预告 临时公告 by 07:30 Beijing Time on the next trading day via 指定媒体; until then, 严禁选择性披露 and avoid one-on-one guidance to analysts or key customers.
Contact: Compliance Officer Mr. Ren Guodong (任国东先生), compliance@hengzhi-tech.cn, for questions on PIPL consent templates, insider list updates, or Exchange disclosure timing.
Reminder: This memo is internal for Hengzhi Technology Co., Ltd. only; onward circulation is prohibited; return signed acknowledgment to Legal by close of business.
